allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)" 2>&1 || python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(python - << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

folder = r"C:\\Users\\EAN11\\Desktop\\energy-essential-mode\\project\\assets\\교체 고민중"
files = [f for f in os.listdir\(folder\) if f.endswith\('.png'\)]

for fname in files:
    path = os.path.join\(folder, fname\)
    img = Image.open\(path\)
    print\(f"{fname}: {img.size}, mode={img.mode}"\)
    if img.mode == 'RGBA':
        bbox = img.getbbox\(\)
        print\(f"  -> bounding box: {bbox}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"  -> no alpha channel, skipping"\)
EOF)

Bash(python - << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

folder = r"C:\\Users\\EAN11\\Desktop\\energy-essential-mode\\project\\assets\\교체 고민중"
files = [f for f in os.listdir\(folder\) if f.endswith\('.png'\)]

for fname in files:
    path = os.path.join\(folder, fname\)
    img = Image.open\(path\)
    if img.mode != 'RGBA':
        print\(f"SKIP: {fname} \(no alpha\)"\)
        continue
    bbox = img.getbbox\(\)
    if bbox is None:
        print\(f"SKIP: {fname} \(fully transparent\)"\)
        continue
    orig_size = img.size
    trimmed = img.crop\(bbox\)
    trimmed.save\(path\)
    print\(f"OK: {fname}  {orig_size} -> {trimmed.size}"\)

EOF)
